_usage.files: List of file path fragments. Any staged file whose path contains one of these strings is skipped entirely. E.g.: 'tests/fixtures', '.example'
_usage.patterns: List of regex strings. Any staged line matching one of these regexes is skipped by the secret-scanner, even if it matches a secret pattern. Use for test fixtures or example values.
_usage.pragma: Add '// nosecret' or '# nosecret' as a comment on the specific line to skip it individually.
